name: marketpal
description: MarketPal deterministic portfolio-planning capabilities for agent harnesses.

interface.shortDescription: Deterministic MarketPal planning tools for agents.
interface.longDescription: Use mpal to list approved strategies, run explicit strategy configs, fetch MarketPal portfolio/watchlist data, validate final plans, run backtests, and journal agent decisions. The plugin does not execute live trades.
defaultPrompt: Set up MarketPal and run safe smoke tests.
Explain this mpal TRADE or NO_TRADE result.
Validate and journal this final plan.
